Memewear · no login · direct checkout

Streetwear should feel like an inside joke you can wear. LOONDRY drops meme-based black tees and mugs made for people who like clean fits, loud references, and prints that start conversations.

Shop now

T-shirts. Mugs. UPI checkout.

Meme-first streetwear

Every tee is built around bold internet-culture graphics, clean black oversized styling, and prints made to stand out without looking cheap.

Drop-style collection

Products are kept limited and simple: statement tees, conversation-starting mugs, direct checkout, and a no-login shopping experience.

Request your meme

Seen a meme that deserves to be on a tee? Send the idea and LOONDRY can consider it for the next streetwear drop.

How to Order

01

Add your pick

Choose a tee or mug and add it to cart.

02

Fill delivery details

Enter name, address, mobile, landmark and tee size.

03

Pay by UPI

Scan the QR, confirm payment and generate your order ID.

FAQ

Order information

How do I place an order?

Add products to cart, click checkout, enter delivery details, pay using UPI and generate your order ID.

How is my order confirmed?

After payment confirmation, order details are prepared for WhatsApp and email with the generated order ID.

What is the refund policy?

No refund policy. Every order is procured and prepared prior to dispatch, so all confirmed orders are final.

Entire website built and maintained by @Johnoninternett on Instagram.
